title: anthemis cretica var. macrocephala
intro: Anthemis cretica var. macrocephala, also known as a variety of the Anthemis cretica plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica var. macrocephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
